As a new superstar flooded with media attention, Kayleb was poised for scholarship offers, including one from Army that was later withdrawn. The reason? programme.title: Locked On NHL
programme.desc:
A rotating cast of local hosts from the Locked On Podcast Network guide you through each day in the National Hockey League with a collection of themed shows. Gil Martin gets started on Mondays by checking in with three of the network's local experts to chat about the biggest stories going on league-wide. Tuesday sees Mike DiStefano and Ross Levitan take stock of the Eastern Conference, followed by a Western Conference check-in on Wednesdays with Brett Holden and Jess Belmosto. Chris Micieli and Adam Denker present league Power Rankings every Thursday. Things wrap up on Fridays as DiBiase and Rachel Donner review the week that was and look ahead to the weekend slate of action in the NHL.
Part of the Locked On Podcast Network.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: The World Poker Tour returns to Canada for the $5,000 buy-in WPT Fallsview Poker Classic. The event attracted a field of 419 entrants, creating a prize pool of more than $1.5 million, and the overwhelming chip leader at the final table is Season XII WPT champion Anthony Zinno.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Season XII WPT champion Anthony Zinno remains the chip leader of the $5,000 buy-in WPT Fallsview Poker Classic. Zinno battles Corey Hochman, David Cloutier, and Mark Bailey for the lion’s share of the more than $1.5 million prize pool.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Only three players remain in the Season XIII WPT Fallsview Poker Classic. For the first time, Season XII WPT champion Anthony Zinno is on the short stack. Zinno, Corey Hochman, and Mark Bailey battle for the more than $300,000 first-place prize, a Hublot® Oceanographic 4000 Watch, and a pair of Monster® 24K Headphones.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: Fresh off of his win in the WPT Fallsview Poker Classic, Anthony Zinno goes for back-to-back victories and his third World Poker Tour title at the WPT L.A. Poker Classic. He competes against Chris Klodnicki, Igor Yaroshevsky, Mike Leah, Peter Neff, and Peter Tran for the more than $1 million top prize.

programme.title: World Poker Tour
programme.desc: With more than $1 million up for grabs, Anthony Zinno remains in the hunt for back-to-back victories and his third World Poker Tour title at the WPT L.A. Poker Classic. Standing in his way are seasoned professionals Mike Leah and Chris Klodnicki, along with Ukranian Igor Yaroshevsky and local Peter Neff.

programme.title: Any Two Cards - Poker Night In America
programme.desc: Rivers Casino in Pittsburgh, PA hosts our cash game while our invited pros start to play a little loose. Also, we show Part 2 of our in-depth interview with Jennifer Tilly. programme.title: Where There's Smoke... - Poker Night In America

programme.title: S1E1 The Jackson Goldstone Story
programme.desc: Beyond Limits: The Jackson Goldstone Story is an electrifying YouTube series that follows mountain biking sensation Jackson Goldstone through his 2023 UCI Downhill World Championship season. Watch as he pushes his limits on some of the most dangerous downhill courses in the world, from steep, rocky descents to twisting forest trails, attacking every challenge with unmatched skill and determination. Go behind the scenes to see the intense training sessions, precise bike tuning, and mental preparation that fuel his success. Experience the rush of high-stakes racing with heart-pounding runs, fierce rivalries, and moments that will keep you holding your breath. More than just the action, Beyond Limits reveals Jackson’s personal journey, the sacrifices he makes for his passion, and the powerful support network that drives him forward. This is the ultimate inside look at a world-class athlete chasing glory on two wheels.

programme.title: Western Mail 1942
programme.desc: In Western Mail, action gallops across the frontier when government agents go undercover to smash a ruthless gang of stagecoach robbers. Posing as outlaws themselves, the daring lawmen risk everything to win the trust of the bandits and bring justice to the West. Packed with blazing gunfights, double-crosses, and nonstop thrills, this classic Western delivers fast-paced excitement straight from the saddle.

programme.title: Mclintock! 1963
programme.desc: John Wayne leads the charge in McLintock!, a rip-roaring Western comedy brimming with action, romance, and frontier spirit. As wealthy cattle baron George Washington McLintock tries to keep the peace between feuding homesteaders, rowdy cowhands, and local Native tribes, he also faces his toughest battle yet—his fiery estranged wife (Maureen O’Hara), who’s just returned to town. Filled with slapstick brawls, lively banter, and heartwarming humor, McLintock! delivers classic Western entertainment with larger-than-life charm.

programme.title: Apocalypse Joe 1970
programme.desc: In Apocalypse Joe, Anthony Steffen stars as a wandering gunslinger who inherits land in a lawless frontier town. When ruthless killers move in to claim it for themselves, Joe answers with blazing six-guns, deadly precision, and a flair for theatrical showdowns. Bursting with Spaghetti Western style—complete with brutal action, sweeping vistas, and a haunting score—this cult favorite turns vengeance into a deadly performance on the stage of the Wild West.
